name: ETHPlus
redeem: ETH+ is a Reserve Yield DTF/RToken that can be redeemed permissionlessly onchain for its underlying ETH-pegged collateral basket. The Reserve app also offers zapper exits into ETH or other ERC-20s, subject to swap liquidity and slippage.
notes: Diversified liquid-staking ETH basket; official app shows collateral exposure to wstETH, weETH, rETH, sfrxETH, and ETHx. Structure is transparent and onchain, but collateral, oracle, governance, and LST depeg risks remain.
